Lining, 3 Layer Laminated, Waterproof Breatheable Fabrics
Lining, 3 Layer Laminated, Waterproof Breatheable Fabrics
Lining, 3 Layer Laminated, Waterproof Breatheable Fabrics
390 g/m² , 100% AriPam, Uv protective, 3/1 S Twill Woven Fabric

100% AriPam spun heavy twill fabric. It is used as a lining inside of the shoes. Ari Gabardin 7/7 can also be used for winter jackets, pants and trousers. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Lining for Shoes Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Uv Protection Done EN ISO 13758 Technical Documents >> Ari Gabardin 7/7 Data Sheet Certificates
